What Are Senolytics?
Senolytics are natural, plant-based compounds that help fight one of the hallmarks of aging– senescent cell accumulation.   
Senescent cells (also called “zombie cells”) are the old, worn out cells in your body that start accumulating in us past age 30, wasting your energy and nutrition without benefiting your health as intended. This often leads to accelerated aging like sluggish energy, joint discomfort, brain fog, and more. Senolytics are plant-based compounds that help your body eliminate senescent cells so you can feel younger, and age better at the cellular level.\
A Holistic Approach
Senescent cells are called “zombie cells” for a reason. They’re stubborn, and resist easy elimination. Our science team crafted each ingredient in our formula to support different biological considerations that are all key to maximizing the elimination of senescent cells.\
Impeccable Ingredient Sourcing
All ingredients in Qualia Senolytic are ethically sourced, gluten free, and 3rd party tested. The formula also includes ingredients in patented and trademarked forms which are clinically studied, and ensure standardized potency and quality.
Relationships Between Ingredients
Our science team pioneered the use of complex systems science in supplement formulations, which values the sum total effect of different ingredients in combination with each other, including deep study of their ideal dosage relationships, to achieve the greatest health benefits.\
Qualia Senolytic Ingredients
QUERCEFIT® QUERCETIN PHYTOSOME
Quercetin is a yellow plant pigment shown to support pruning of stressed cells and healthy changes to their behavior. But quercetin is poorly absorbed by the human body. Quercefit® is a unique and patented Phytosome® formulation of quercetin created to overcome this bioavailability obstacle. By creating a quercetin phytosome complex using sunflower lecithin, the bioavailability is dramatically enhanced.
FISETIN
Fisetin is a flavonol found in certain fruits and vegetables, such as strawberries and persimmon. Like quercetin, it was one of the first senolytic ingredients ever discovered, and boasts one of the most impressive bodies of research of all senolytics. Fisetin has been strongly correlated with supporting body tissues by helping with pruning of stressed cells.
LUTEOLIN
Luteolin is a yellow plant pigment used for centuries as a yellow dye. In fact, the latin name for yellow is luteus. Luteolin has a very similar molecular structure to quercetin, and much like fisetin, luteolin has also shown evidence of senolytic properties by helping to manage senescent cell elimination.
LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACT
Curcumin is the pigment in turmeric that results in its yellow-orange coloring. Curcumin appears to have senolytic potential in intervertebral disc cells, but much like quercetin, it has poor bioavailability. LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACT was developed to overcome this bioavailability hurdle and has been researched in human studies in areas including cognitive function, mood, exercise recovery, and joint health.
PIPERLONGUMINE (FROM PIPER LONGUM ROOT EXTRACT)
Piperlongumine is an alkaloid found in many species of pepper plant, and found in abundance in the Asian long pepper plant (Piper longum), particularly in its root structure from which we source our piperlongumine. It is the only natural compound known to support a novel mechanism that helps manage senescent cells called oxidation resistance 1 or OXR1.
SENACTIV®
SENACTIV® is a patented blend of notoginseng root and chestnut rose hips. It has been shown to support exercise recovery and management of senescent cells in muscle. This provides an asset within our formula to help counteract the slow workout recoveries that are common with the human aging process.
OLIVE LEAF EXTRACT
Oleuropein (a secoiridoid polyphenol) is found in high amounts within olive leaves. Our particular olive leaf extract is standardized for 40% oleuropein. A 2020 study showed that oleuropein supports the management of senescent chondrocytes—chondrocytes are the cells that create cartilage and support healthy joints (an area of our bodies which commonly experience noticeable negative aging symptoms).
MILK THISTLE FRUIT EXTRACT
The seed-like fruits from milk thistle (Silybum marianum) have been in Mediterranean diets for over 2,000 years. The main active substance in milk thistle is silymarin. Our extract is standardized to 80% silymarin by spectrophotometry, and has potential in playing a complementary role to other ingredients in Qualia Senolytic, particularly the stressed cell support of curcumin.
SOYBEAN SEED EXTRACT
Soybean seeds, like most legumes, contain a type of bioflavonoid called isoflavonoids. Our soybean seed extract is standardized at 40% isoflavones which shows promise as a having a complementary role in our overall formulation. Daidzein, for example (an isoflavonoid in our extract) is one of the top four compounds identified as a possible candidate for helping manage some types of senescent cells.

FAQs
Can senolytic supplements help support healthy aging?
+
There have been 3 studies conducted on Qualia Senolytic. In the most recent clinical study, Qualia Senolytic improved aspects of healthy function during aging, most notably joint comfort and performance were significantly improved compared to placebo.\
What is the most potent senolytic?
+
In a preclinical study that screened a panel of 10 flavonoid polyphenols for senolytic activity using senescent fibroblasts (the most common cells of connective tissues) from humans and mice, it was found that fisetin was the most potent senolytic, even surpassing the clinically studied senolytic compound quercetin. There are several ongoing clinical studies sponsored by the Mayo Clinic to assess the senolytic action of fisetin in humans.\
When should I take Qualia Senolytic?
+
You should take Qualia Senolytic with whatever meal is most convenient for you, regardless of the time of day. You should take each serving on back-to-back days, i.e., six capsules per day on two consecutive days. Wait about four weeks before repeating. Use monthly for best results.\
Should senolytics be taken every day?
+
We do not recommend taking Qualia senolytic every day. Intermittent use—some experts call this a “hit and run” approach—is the way senolytics are most commonly used in clinical studies to support healthy aging. It is also the way we have supplemented Qualia Senolytic in our 3 studies.\
Why is there soy in Qualia Senolytic?
+
Soybeans are the most common source of isoflavones in food. Soy isoflavones have been proposed as candidates worth exploring for supporting the management of senescent cells. The soy isoflavone daidzein was one of the top 4 compounds identified as a candidate for supporting the management of some types of senescent cells based on their structure and function characteristics. We included a soybean seed extract standardized for 40% isoflavones in Qualia Senolytic because we expect this extract to have a complementary role in the overall formulation.\
Is Qualia Senolytic clinically tested?
+
Yes. A double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial of Qualia Senolytic was carried out with thirty-six adults aged 35 to 79 years old who had at least a moderate degree of difficulty in comfortably performing a variety of activities of daily living. Participants completed three of the two-day supplementation cycles during the study, meaning they took either Qualia Senolytic or a placebo for a total of six days over about one month. The clinical study showed a statistically significant reduction in total scores of issues related to joint health and performance, which includes joint discomfort and physical function. The most promising result was an average 68% reduction in joint discomfort.\

How should I take Qualia Stem Cell?
+
Take 6 capsules with water each morning for 4 consecutive days. Repeat monthly for best results. You can take three capsules of Qualia Stem Cell twice a day at different meals, or take all six capsules at once.
Why do you recommend taking Qualia Stem Cell for only 4 days a month?
+
Stem cells are often in a resting state—inactive but ready to act when needed. Qualia Stem Cell was formulated to help “wake” some of them to support healing and healthy aging. Instead of activating stem cells daily, we think it makes more sense to support activity for short bursts of time, mimicking a healthy physiological healing response.\
How soon will I notice a difference?
+
The core botanicals promoting optimal circulating stem cell levels are branded ingredients (CyanthOx™, AFAninPlus®, Aloemac®) with clinical studies suggesting that an increase in stem cell numbers occurs within 3 hours after consuming the product. The timeline for seeing benefits after this initial increase in numbers can vary significantly depending on individual factors, but it could take up to several months to begin to notice benefits. Qualia Stem Cell is a product that should be thought of as something that provides more benefit with repeated cycles of use.\
Do I need to take it every month or could I take it quarterly instead?
+
Taking Qualia Stem Cell less than once a month is fine, but the trade-off is receiving less stem cell support for tissue healing and healthy aging. Monthly is the dosing approach we recommend for adults of all ages who are beginning to notice or experience signs of aging. For younger individuals under 30 or those not yet experiencing aging effects, quarterly use can be a proactive option.\

1 Age-Defying Bundle.
The Ultimate Longevity Bundle is a popular recommendation by doctors and health practitioners because it dynamically addresses many aspects of age-related cellular decline with highly specialized nutrition. And it's easy! Qualia NAD+ is a simple 2-capsule dose taken each morning, Qualia Stem Cell is taken just 4 days a month, and Qualia Senolytic is taken just 2 days a month. Together, they work to support a multitude of health benefits at the leading edge of advanced nutrition.
A Comprehensive Approach
Clearing senescent cells, thriving stem cell activity deep into life, and boosting NAD+ by 67% ‡. These were extremely challenging endeavors for our science team. It required precise ingredient combinations in which each ingredient’s role in an overarching health goal was deeply researched by our R&D team.\
Impeccable Ingredient Sourcing
All ingredients in The Ultimate Longevity Bundle (and in every Qualia product) are ethically sourced, non-GMO, and 3rd party tested. Additionally, many ingredients are in patented and trademarked forms and clinically studied, to further ensure standardized potency and quality.\
Relationships Between Ingredients
Our science team pioneered the use of complex systems science in supplement formulations, which values the sum total effect of different ingredients in combination with each other, including deep study of their ideal dosage relationships, to achieve the greatest health benefits.\
Notable Ingredients In The Ultimate Longevity Bundle
QUERCEFIT® QUERCETIN PHYTOSOME
In Qualia Senolytic: Quercetin is a yellow plant pigment shown to support pruning of stressed cells and healthy changes to their behavior. But quercetin is poorly absorbed by the human body. Quercefit® is a unique and patented Phytosome® formulation of quercetin created to overcome this bioavailability obstacle. By creating a quercetin phytosome complex using sunflower lecithin, the bioavailability is dramatically enhanced.
CYANTHOX™ (sea buckthorn fruit extract)
In Qualia Stem Cell: CyanthOx™ is an extract from sea buckhorn fruit (native to Tibet) which has been clinically studied for supporting the mobilization of stem cell types involved in the body’s healthy self-healing and self-renewal functions, including progenitor stem cells, endothelial stem cells, and lymphocytoid mesenchymal stem cells.\
NIAGEN® (Nicotinamide Riboside)
In Qualia NAD+: NIAGEN® (Nicotinamide Riboside) is a patented, clinically studied, next-generation source of vitamin B3 backed by 300+ clinical studies. It differs from niacin and niacinamide (the first-generation forms of vitamin B3) because it contains more of the full NAD+ molecule and is metabolized into NAD+ differently. It is considered an NAD+ precursor as it is a direct precursor in the biosynthesis pathway of NAD+. NIAGEN® has been clinically studied to boost NAD+.\
FISETIN
In Qualia Senolytic: Fisetin is a flavonol found in certain fruits and vegetables, such as strawberries and persimmon. Like quercetin, it was one of the first senolytic ingredients ever discovered, and boasts one of the most impressive bodies of research of all senolytics. Fisetin has been strongly correlated with supporting body tissues by helping with pruning of stressed cells.
ALOMAC® (Aloe macroclada extract)
In Qualia Stem Cell:Aloe macroclada is native to Madagascar,where it has been used by the Malagasy people for centuries to support natural healing and to promote rejuvenation and longevity. Alomac®, a standardized extract, has been studied for supporting healthy stem cell functions in humans, where it enhanced hematopoietic stem cells up 53%.\
Niacinamide (vitamin B3)
In Qualia NAD+: Niacinamide (vitamin B3) is a NAD+ precursor that is part of the B complex—a group of water-soluble vitamins that play important roles in cellular metabolism and energy production. It is called B3 because it was the third of the B complex vitamins to be discovered. It is on the World Health Organization's List of Essential Medicines, as one of the most effective and safe nutrients needed in a health system.\
PIPERLONGUMINE (FROM PIPER LONGUM ROOT EXTRACT)
In Qualia Senolytic: Piperlongumine is an alkaloid found in many species of pepper plant, and found in abundance in the Asian long pepper plant (Piper longum), particularly in its root structure from which we source our piperlongumine. It is the only natural compound known to support a novel mechanism that helps manage senescent cells called oxidation resistance 1 or OXR1.
AFANINPLUS® (Aphanizomenon flos-aquae extract)
In Qualia Stem Cell: AFAninPlus® is an extract derived from Aphanizomenon flos-aquae (AFA), a blue-green algae harvested from the pristine, high-desert Klamath Lake in Southern Oregon. Clinically, AFA has been shown to boost levels of circulating hematopoietic stem cells by an average of 25%, to support a healthy immune system, and provide free radical protection, which are essential for the healthy activities and survival mechanisms of stem cells.\
NICOTINIC ACID
In Qualia NAD+: Nicotinic acid (vitamin B3). The term niacin is often used as a synonym for this form of vitamin B3. It is considered an NAD+ precursor because compounds with niacin activity are defined by their ability to contribute to the nicotinamide unit of an NAD+, critical for mitochondrial energy production, cellular repair and signaling, and cellular defenses. Nicotinic acid makes NAD via the Preiss-Handler pathway. \
Learn More About The Other 29 Ingredients
+
TRANS-RESVERATROL (trans-3, 5, 4'-trihydroxystilbene) in Qualia NAD+ is usually just called resveratrol. It is a stilbenoid, a type of natural polyphenol found in plants. Resveratrol has been the subject of thousands of pre-clinical and clinical research studies. It is best known for supporting healthy aging functions, and for supporting metabolism, heart health, immune health, and cognition.\ Resveratrol is a defense compound that plants make more of when exposed to environmental stressors. It toughens them up, making them more resistant to stress.
MAGNESIUM (from Aquamin® MG)in Qualia NAD+. Magnesium is one of the most abundant minerals in the body and plays a vital role in supporting the function of all living cells. It’s used in more than 300 enzymes. ATP (i.e., cellular energy) occurs complexed with magnesium, so all enzymes utilizing ATP require magnesium to support their activity. ATP production, particularly through mitochondrial processes, promotes greater NAD+ turnover (the continuous use and recycling of NAD+).\
COFFEEBERRY® in Qualia NAD+ is made from organic coffee fruits, which are often called coffee cherries. Like cherries, coffee plants produce soft red fruits surrounding a pit or hard seed. The seed (or coffee "bean") is roasted to make coffee. But it’s the fruit that is being used to make Coffeeberry®. Similar to many fruits, coffee cherries are high in polyphenols. And like coffee beans, they also contain caffeine. Caffeine has been found to activate AMPK, a key energy-sensing enzyme that plays a significant role in promoting NAD+ biosynthesis.\
B-COMPLEX VITAMINS (from Saccharomyces cerevisiae culture) in Qualia NAD+ is an inactivated yeast that provides all eight B vitamins (and thus 8 ingredients within the Qualia NAD+ formula): thiamine (B1), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), biotin (B7), folic acid (B9), and cobalamin (B12). B vitamins have essential roles in cellular metabolism and energy production. Every B vitamin is either a cofactor or a precursor of a cofactor for a key metabolic process. B vitamins are essential for the generation of cell energy as ATP in mitochondria.\
LUTEOLIN found in Qualia Senolytic, is a yellow plant pigment used for centuries as a yellow dye. In fact, the latin name for yellow is luteus. Luteolin has a very similar molecular structure to quercetin, and much like fisetin, luteolin has also shown evidence of senolytic properties by helping the body manage senescent cell elimination.\
LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACTis found in Qualia Senolytic. Curcumin is the pigment in turmeric that results in its yellow-orange coloring. Curcumin appears to provide senolytic support in intervertebral disc cells, but much like quercetin, it has poor bioavailability. Longvida Optimized Curcumin® Extract was developed to overcome this bioavailability hurdle and has been researched in human studies in areas including cognitive function, mood, exercise recovery, and joint health.\
SENACTIV® is a patented blend of notoginseng root and chestnut rose hips. It has been shown to support exercise recovery and management of senescent cells in muscle. This provides an asset within our formula to help counteract the slow workout recoveries that are common with the human aging process.You can find it in Qualia Senolytic.
OLIVE LEAF EXTRACT Oleuropein (a secoiridoid polyphenol) is found in high amounts within olive leaves. Our particular olive leaf extract is standardized for 40% oleuropein. A 2020 study showed that oleuropein supports the management of senescent chondrocytes—chondrocytes are the cells that create cartilage and support healthy joints (an area of our bodies which commonly experience noticeable negative aging symptoms).\ Olive leaf extract is a key ingredient in Qualia Senolytic.
MILK THISTLE FRUIT EXTRACT (found in Qualia Senolytic). The seed-like fruits from milk thistle (Silybum marianum) have been in Mediterranean diets for over 2,000 years. The main active substance in milk thistle is silymarin. Our extract is standardized to 80% silymarin by spectrophotometry, and has potential in playing a complementary role to other ingredients in Qualia Senolytic, particularly the stressed cell support of curcumin.\
SOYBEAN SEED EXTRACT Soybean seeds, like most legumes, contain a type of bioflavonoid called isoflavonoids. Our soybean seed extract is standardized at 40% isoflavones which shows promise as having a complementary role in our overall formulation. Daidzein, for example (an isoflavonoid in our extract) is one of the top four compounds identified as a possible candidate for helping manage some types of senescent cells.\ You can find it in Qualia Senolytic.
OKINAWA MOZUKU EXTRACT is a brown seaweed grown in the coastal waters of Okinawa, where it is a foundational superfood in this blue zone’s diet. This extract contains ≥85% fucoidan, which provides support for a healthy immune system and for stem cell functions including stem cell mobilization and migration.\ You can find it in Qualia Stem Cell.
ASTRAGALUS ROOT EXTRACT found in Qualia Stem Cell. Astragalus membranaceus, or Huang Qi, is a perennial herb native to northeast Asia, flourishing in dry, sandy soils and regions such as mountain thickets and vast grasslands. In Traditional Chinese Medicine it is one of the most important herbs for tonifying Qi and enhancing vitality, and is also renowned for healing and promoting healthy blood circulation. Preclinical studies suggest that Astragalus root aids healing by promoting healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\
SALVIA MILTIORRHIZA EXTRACT found in Qualia Stem Cell. Salvia miltiorrhiza, known as Danshen in Traditional Chinese Medicine, primarily grows in the rich, earthy soils of East Asia’s temperate and subtropical regions along hillsides, moist stream banks, and in cool, shaded forests. Traditionally, Danshen was believed to have an affinity for the heart and was used to promote heart health, blood circulation, and healing. Preclinically, Danshen has been shown to support the healthy differentiation and proliferation of various stem cell types, leading to improved tissue health like heart and liver.\
WHITE PEONY ROOT EXTRACT in Qualia Stem Cell, is a Traditional Chinese Medicine native to central and eastern Asia that grows in a variety of environments, such as glasslands, woodland edges, dry meadows and sunny slopes. Paeoniflorin, a primary bioactive compound extracted from the roots of white peony, is known to maintain a balanced activity of CDC42, which is a crucial mechanism for stem cell rejuvenation. Preclinical studies show that paeoniflorin supports healthy stem cell proliferation, differentiation, and self-renewal, driving tissue regeneration.
SODIUM COPPER CHLOROPHYLLIN in Qualia Stem Cell is derived from chlorophyll, the vibrant green pigment found in plants and algae that plays a crucial role in photosynthesis. In preclinical studies, this compound helps protect stem cells against oxidative stress and supports healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\
L-SERINE in Qualia Stem Cell is an amino acid essential for protein synthesis and plays a vital role in stem cell function and maintenance. It is also required for nucleotide synthesis - the basic building blocks of DNA and RNA - which supports stem cell division, proliferation, and growth.\
NUCLEOPRIME® NUCLEOTIDES BLEND Nucleotides are the complex molecules that form DNA and RNA. DNA is sometimes referred to as the "blueprint for life", and RNA translates the information stored in DNA to make the proteins and express our genes. They are essential compounds during times of tissue self-renewal so act a bit like fuel for numerous stem cell functions.\ Found in Qualia Stem Cell.
WELLMUNE® SOLUBLE YEAST BETA GLUCAN Wellmune® Soluble supports the body’s natural defenses. Over a dozen clinical trials demonstrate the ability of Wellmune® to help maintain a healthy immune system and support overall energy and vitality. The soluble beta-glucans in Wellmune support healthy stem cell migration, renewal, and survival mechanisms.\ Found in Qualia Stem Cell.
BROMELAIN in Qualia Stem Cell is a mixture of protein digesting enzymes derived primarily from the stem and fruit of the pineapple known for its use in promoting a healthy inflammatory response, in supporting tissue healing, and in supporting the production of extracellular matrix components, such as collagen. Preclinical studies demonstrate their ability to support creation of a favorable microenvironment for stem cell activities and tissue regeneration.\
PANAX NOTOGINSING ROOT EXTRACT Panax notoginseng, or Sanqi/Tianqi in Traditional Chinese Medicine, is a prized medicinal plant native to the warm mountainous regions of Southwest China, and is known for promoting healthy blood circulation, supporting healing, and supporting the immune system. In preclinical studies, Panax notoginseng root has been shown to support the healthy differentiation and proliferation of various stem cell types, leading to improved tissue renewal.\ Found in Qualia Stem Cell.
FERULIC ACID, the primary bioactive compound in Angelica sinensis (Danggui in Traditional Chinese Medicine), is mainly responsible for its antioxidant properties and ability to support healing through the formation of healthy new blood vessels. Besides the preclinical evidence that it supports healthy stem cell differentiation, it is also known to support stem cell self-renewal, or maintenance of the stem cell pool over time.\ Found in Qualia Stem Cell.
ROYAL JELLY POWDER Royal jelly is the nutrient-rich secretion produced by worker honeybees exclusively for the queen bee and young, known especially for supporting the queen’s longevity, fertility, and vitality. It contains a complex of bioactive compounds, including the unique fatty acid 10-hydroxy-2-decenoic acid (10-HDA), which preclinical studies have shown promotes stem cell proliferation and differentiation, promotes telomere health and supports cellular health.\ Found in Qualia Stem Cell.
The Science Of Feeling YoungerTM
YOUR HAPPINESS IS GUARANTEED.
If you do not love Qualia for any reason, simply get in touch via phone or email and let us know you’d like a refund. More on our 100-day guarantee here.
FAQs
How do I get started with Qualia Senolytic?
+
Take Qualia Senolytic with whichever meal works best for your schedule—it doesn’t matter what time of day. Each serving is six capsules daily for two days in a row. After that, pause for about four weeks before repeating. Using it monthly is ideal for consistent benefits.\
What’s the best way to take Qualia Stem Cell?
+
The standard protocol is 6 capsules each morning with water for 4 days straight, once a month. If preferred, you can split the dose into 3 capsules twice daily at separate meals, or take all 6 capsules at once.
How should I take Qualia NAD+?
+
Take 2 Qualia NAD+ capsules in the morning with water or your favorite beverage, with or without food. Morning use is recommended, as research suggests NAD+ precursors may better support metabolic health when aligned with your body’s natural rhythms.\
Does Qualia NAD+ work?
+
Yes! Qualia NAD+® significantly increased NAD+ levels in healthy adults compared to placebo (p < 0.001) in a double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial. There was an average increase of 67% in NAD+ after taking Qualia NAD+ once daily for 4 weeks\‡  
‡Based on double-blind placebo-controlled studies. Individual results may vary. Full study results at qualialife.com/nad-clinical2.
What are senolytics?
+
Senolytic supplements help the body clear out old, damaged “senescent” cells (worn out cells no longer performing their intended function) in the human body. They are also called “zombie cells” for the way they linger on after we want them gone, draining our energy and nutrition. By age 30, their gradual accumulation often begins to accelerate our aging process. Senolytics provide a natural means of supporting the body’s natural elimination of senescent cells.\
Why take Qualia Senolytic only 2 days a month?
+
Most senolytic protocols follow what experts often call a “hit-and-run” strategy: a short burst of use followed by a rest period. This pattern is common in clinical research on healthy aging and is the approach used in our three studies.‡ By alternating days of use with longer breaks, the body gets the benefits without continuous supplementation—similar in concept to a water fast or detox protocol. \
Why take Qualia Stem Cell 4 days a month?
+
Stem cells are typically inactive until called upon to repair or regenerate. Qualia Stem Cell was formulated to briefly “activate” them to support repair and vitality. Rather than daily activation, using it in short monthly cycles better mirrors natural healing rhythms.\
What results could I see from stem cell supplements?
+
After several months of consistent use (3+), Qualia Stem Cell may support renewal in multiple areas: (1) healthier-looking skin, (2) fuller hair, (3) healthier joints, (4) muscle and tendon support, (5) sharper cognitive performance, and (6) improved overall vitality.\
How soon will I notice benefits from senolytics?
+
The effects of Qualia Senolytic build gradually with repeated cycles. In our pilot trial, most people experienced greater comfort and reduced stiffness within two months. Since aging affects systems differently, improvements may show up in areas such as joints, brain, or skin at different times for different people.\
Why does Qualia Senolytic contain soy?
+
Soy is one of the richest dietary sources of isoflavones. Research has suggested certain soy isoflavones, like daidzein, may help with the management of senescent cells. Because daidzein was among the top candidates identified for this purpose, we included a soybean seed extract standardized to 40% isoflavones in Qualia Senolytic to complement the rest of the formulation.\

It is on the World Health Organization's List of Essential Medicines, as one of the most effective and safe nutrients needed in a health system.\
SmartSeed™ Celastrus paniculatus Seed Extract

SENACTIV®

Nicotinic acid (vitamin B3)
In Qualia NAD+: The term niacin is often used as a synonym for this form of vitamin B3. It is considered an NAD+ precursor because compounds with niacin activity are defined by their ability to contribute to the nicotinamide unit of a NAD+, critical for supporting mitochondrial energy production, cellular repair and signaling, and cellular defenses.\ Nicotinic acid makes NAD via the Preiss-Handler pathway.
Nutricog®
In Qualia Mind: Nutricog® is a clinically studied combination of the Ayurvedic herbs Haritaki (Terminalia chebula) and Shallaki (Boswellia serrata). These herbs support healthy neuroprotective functions, function of brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), and optimal acetylcholine signaling.\
QUERCEFIT® QUERCETIN PHYTOSOME

+

And like coffee beans, they also contain caffeine. Caffeine has been found to activate AMPK, a key energy-sensing enzyme that plays a significant role in promoting NAD+ biosynthesis.\
B-Complex Vitamins (from Saccharomyces cerevisiae culture) in Qualia NAD+ is an inactivated yeast that provides all eight B vitamins (and thus 8 ingredients within the Qualia NAD+ formula): thiamine (B1), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), biotin (B7), folic acid (B9), and cobalamin (B12). B vitamins are essential for the generation of cell energy as ATP in mitochondria.
Sabroxy® (Oroxylum indicum bark extract) is made from the dried bark of the Indian trumpet tree/ (Oroxylum indicum). It supports healthy brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) function, helping to maintain neurological health and nerve functions. Sabroxy contains a flavonoid called oroxylin-A that supports healthy dopamine signaling which supports motivation and focus.\
Coffeeberry® Whole Coffee Fruit Extract is made from organic coffee fruits; it contains naturally occurring caffeine and polyphenols found in the fruit which promote healthy activity and energy metabolism in the brain. It also indirectly supports the healthy release of neurotransmitters like dopamine and serotonin.\
Cognizin® A clinically studied source of choline (found in various animal products and vegan foods such as nuts and cruciferous vegetables) and cytidine. It supports healthy acetylcholine production, an important neurotransmitter involved in attention, concentration, learning, memory, and neuroplasticity.\
Phosphatidylserine (from sunflower lecithin) is a phospholipid from sunflower lecithin, and brain-essential nutrient. It is a major phospholipid in the brain, supporting healthy membrane and neurotransmitter signaling, especially in parts of the brain related to memory functions.\
Acetyl-L-Carnitine HCl: an acetylated form of L-carnitine. This form of carnitine crosses the blood-brain barrier and is the preferred form for use in brain and nervous system support. It supplies carnitine and acetyl groups that collectively support the healthy production of acetylcholine neurotransmitter molecules, brain energy production, and neuroprotective functions.\
N-Acetyl-L-Tyrosine:N-acetyl-L-tyrosine (NALT) supplies the amino acid L-tyrosine, which is a building block for dopamine and catecholamine neurotransmitter molecules involved in supporting motivation, focus, and executive functions.\
Taurine:one of the most abundant amino acids in the brain and eyes, where it supports brain health, hearing, and vision. It’s involved in promoting long-term potentiation, healthy GABA and glycine neurotransmission, optimal function for brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), neuronal mitochondrial function, neuroprotection, and photoreceptor cell visual function.\
L-Theanine:an amino acid found in the leaves used to make green and black teas. It promotes activity in the alpha frequency band; this frequency of brain waves is characteristic of attention and relaxation of the mind without drowsiness. L-theanine promotes focused attention, mental alertness, and calm, relaxed energy.\
L-alpha-Glycerylphosphorylcholine (alpha GPC): a choline form found in the brain. It supports healthy acetylcholine production, an important neurotransmitter involved in attention, concentration, learning, memory, and neuroplasticity. Alpha GPC also supports phospholipid metabolism in the brain, which is important for keeping brain cells healthy.\
Guarana Seed Extract: a caffeine-containing plant native to the Amazon, where it was used to stay awake longer and support brain performance. Similar to other caffeine-containing plants, it promotes optimal activity and energy metabolism in the brain. It also indirectly supports the healthy release of neurotransmitters like dopamine, and serotonin, which are involved in alertness, feelings of energy, mood, and motivation.\
Caffeine (anhydrous): Caffeine is the most widely used nootropic substance in the world. It promotes healthy activity and energy metabolism in the brain and nervous system. It also indirectly supports the healthy release of neurotransmitters like dopamine and serotonin, which are involved in alertness, feelings of energy, mood, and motivation.\
Pyrroloquinoline Quinone disodium: also known as (PQQ) is a vitamin-like antioxidant compound. It supports optimal activity, blood flow, and oxygen metabolism in areas of the prefrontal cortex involved in thinking, attention, and memory. PQQ also supports healthy energy production, mitochondrial health, and cellular protection and repair functions.\
Boron (as boron glycinate): Boron is a trace mineral. It is best known for supporting bone health and optimal sex hormone levels. Studies suggest it may also be a brain-essential nutrient. Adequate dietary intake of boron is needed to support healthy brain electrical activity and cognitive performance, especially in areas related to attention and memory.\
Vitamin C (as ascorbic acid): Vitamin C is a brain-essential nutrient. It’s best known for its neuroprotective support as an antioxidant. Vitamin C is involved in the conversion of dopamine to noradrenaline and helps dampen neuronal over-stimulation by glutamate. It also promotes the regulation of catecholamines and acetylcholine from synaptic vesicles and the formation of myelin.\
Vitamin D3 (as cholecalciferol from VegD3®): VegD3® is Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) produced from a non-GMO algal source. Vitamin D3 is a fat-soluble vitamin and a brain essential nutrient involved in the healthy growth and function of neurons by supporting brain‐derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF), glial‐derived neurotrophic factor (GDNF), nerve growth factor (NGF) and other neurotrophic factors. Adequate vitamin D3 is needed for healthy dopamine signaling, neuroprotective functions, and neuroplasticity.\
Thiamine (as thiamine HCl): Thiamine (B1) is a member of the B-complex vitamin family and a brain essential nutrient. It supports healthy brain energy metabolism, neuron health, neurotransmission, and adrenal gland function. Thiamin helps synthesize several neurotransmitters involved in focus, memory, motivation, and mood, including acetylcholine, dopamine, and GABA.\
Riboflavin: Riboflavin (B2) is a member of the B-complex vitamin family and a brain essential nutrient. It supports optimal brain energy production, the production of glutathione (a cellular antioxidant), and healthy adrenal function. Riboflavin is needed for myelin and is used in the metabolism of fats, which is critical in the brain since it is mostly made of fats.\
Niacin (as Niacinamide): Niacinamide (B3) is a member of the B-complex vitamin family and a brain essential nutrient. It supports healthy NAD+ levels, energy production, antioxidant defenses, and cellular repair and stress response functions. Vitamin B3 is critical for maintaining the health of the central nervous system (i.e., it’s neuroprotective).\
Vitamin B6 (as pyridoxal 5'-phosphate):Vitamin B6 is a member of the B-complex vitamin family and a brain essential nutrient. Pyridoxal 5'-phosphate is a coenzyme (i.e., active) form of vitamin B6. It supports the healthy production of brain glucose and energy metabolism. Vitamin B6 is directly or indirectly needed for supporting the production of neurotransmitters related to motivation, focus, and mood, including acetylcholine, dopamine, GABA, and serotonin.\
Folate (as L-5'-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium):Folate (B9) is a member of the B-complex vitamin family and a brain essential nutrient. L-5'-methyltetrahydrofolate calcium is a coenzyme (i.e., active) form of folate. It supports the healthy function of brain and nerve cells, and is needed for the production of myelin. Folate is involved in promoting healthy dopamine, melatonin, noradrenaline, and serotonin, and supports healthy hearing, mood, and vision.\
Vitamin B12 (as methylcobalamin):Vitamin B12 is a B-complex vitamin and a brain essential nutrient. Methylcobalamin is the coenzyme (i.e., active) form of vitamin B12, and the preferred nootropic form. It supports the healthy function of brain and nerve cells, and is needed for the production of myelin. Methylcobalamin is involved in promoting healthy dopamine, melatonin, noradrenaline, and serotonin, and supports healthy hearing and vision.
Biotin:Biotin (B7) is a B-complex vitamin and a brain essential nutrient. It supports healthy glucose metabolism, which is important because the brain is particularly sensitive to the delivery and metabolism of glucose. Adequate dietary biotin is also important for healthy dopamine neurotransmission.\
Pantothenic Acid (as calcium pantothenate):Pantothenic acid (B5) is a B-complex vitamin and a brain essential nutrient. It supports healthy brain energy production, the synthesis of neurotransmitters (most notably acetylcholine), the production of the myelin required for healthy nerve function, and adrenal function (it’s often referred to as the “anti-stress” vitamin).\
Magnesium (as magnesium aspartate):Magnesium (Mg) is a brain essential mineral. It is needed for the optimal production of dopamine and serotonin, and plays a role in supporting other neurotransmitters, including GABA and glutamate. Mg is also an essential factor in making and activating ATP (brain energy), nerve transmission, blood-brain barrier integrity, a healthy stress response, and hearing and vision.\
LUTEOLIN is a yellow plant pigment used for centuries as a yellow dye. In fact, the latin name for yellow is luteus. Luteolin has a very similar molecular structure to quercetin, and much like fisetin, luteolin has also shown evidence of senolytic properties by helping to manage senescent cell elimination.
LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACTCurcumin is the pigment in turmeric that results in its yellow-orange coloring. Curcumin appears to have senolytic potential in intervertebral disc cells, but much like quercetin, it has poor bioavailability. LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACT was developed to overcome this bioavailability hurdle and has been researched in human studies in areas including cognitive function, mood, exercise recovery, and joint health.
PIPERLONGUMINE (FROM PIPER LONGUM ROOT EXTRACT) is an alkaloid found in many species of pepper plant, and found in abundance in the Asian long pepper plant (Piper longum), particularly in its root structure from which we source our piperlongumine. It is the only natural compound known to support a novel mechanism that helps manage senescent cells called oxidation resistance 1 or OXR1.
OLIVE LEAF EXTRACT Oleuropein (a secoiridoid polyphenol) is found in high amounts within olive leaves. Our particular olive leaf extract is standardized for 40% oleuropein. A 2020 study showed that oleuropein supports the management of senescent chondrocytes—chondrocytes are the cells that create cartilage and support healthy joints (an area of our bodies which commonly experience noticeable negative aging symptoms).
MILK THISTLE FRUIT EXTRACT The seed-like fruits from milk thistle (Silybum marianum) have been in Mediterranean diets for over 2,000 years. The main active substance in milk thistle is silymarin. Our extract is standardized to 80% silymarin by spectrophotometry, and has potential in playing a complementary role to other ingredients in Qualia Senolytic, particularly the stressed cell support of curcumin.
SOYBEAN SEED EXTRACT Soybean seeds, like most legumes, contain a type of bioflavonoid called isoflavonoids. Our soybean seed extract is standardized at 40% isoflavones which shows promise as having a complementary role in our overall formulation. Daidzein, for example (an isoflavonoid in our extract) is one of the top four compounds identified as a possible candidate for helping manage some types of senescent cells.
Improving the Experience of LifeTM
YOUR HAPPINESS IS GUARANTEED.
If you do not love Qualia for any reason, simply get in touch via phone or email and let us know you’d like a refund. More on our 100-day guarantee here.
How do I get started with Qualia NAD+?
+
You can get started with Qualia NAD+ simply by taking 2 capsules with water or a beverage of your choice in the morning, with or without food. We recommend taking Qualia NAD+ at the beginning of your day because circadian (i.e., body clock) research in animals suggests that NAD+ boosting compounds offer better support for metabolic health when taken in the morning. Taking Qualia NAD+ at the start of your day makes the best use of these natural rhythms.\
How do I get started with Qualia Senolytic?
+
You should take Qualia Senolytic with whatever meal is most convenient for you, regardless of the time of day. You should take each serving on back-to-back days, i.e., six capsules per day on two consecutive days. Wait about four weeks before repeating. Use monthly for best results.\
What is the difference between Qualia Senolytic and Qualia NAD+?
+
While Qualia Senolytic and Qualia NAD+ both are longevity supplements, they have different objectives. Qualia Senolytic is designed to help the body naturally clear senescent cells. Qualia NAD+ has been clinically proven to boost NAD+ levels by 67%. Qualia NAD+ was designed to complement Qualia Senolytic.\
How do I get started with Qualia Mind?
+
You can get started with Qualia Mind simply by taking your daily serving early in the morning with a large glass of water, with or without food. You should take it for 5 days followed by 2 days off each week to maximize benefits and prevent habituation.\

In Qualia Senolytic: Fisetin is a flavonol found in certain fruits and vegetables, such as strawberries and persimmon. Like quercetin, it was one of the first senolytic ingredients ever discovered, and boasts one of the most impressive bodies of research of all senolytics. Fisetin has been strongly correlated with supporting body tissues by helping with pruning of stressed cells.
Niacinamide (vitamin B3)
In Qualia NAD+: Niacinamide (vitamin B3) is a NAD+ precursor that is part of the B complex—a group of water-soluble vitamins that play important roles in cellular metabolism and energy production. It is called B3 because it was the third of the B complex vitamins to be discovered. It is on the World Health Organization's List of Essential Medicines, as one of the most effective and safe nutrients needed in a health system.\
SENACTIV®
In Qualia Senolytic: SENACTIV® is a patented blend of notoginseng root and chestnut rose hips. It has been shown to support exercise recovery and management of senescent cells in muscle. This provides an asset within our formula to help counteract the slow workout recoveries that are common with the human aging process.
Nicotinic acid (vitamin B3)
In Qualia NAD+: The term niacin is often used as a synonym for this form of vitamin B3. It is considered an NAD+ precursor because compounds with niacin activity are defined by their ability to contribute to the nicotinamide unit of a NAD+, critical for supporting mitochondrial energy production, cellular repair and signaling, and cellular defenses.\ Nicotinic acid makes NAD via the Preiss-Handler pathway.
QUERCEFIT® QUERCETIN PHYTOSOME
In Qualia Senolytic: Quercetin is a yellow plant pigment shown to support pruning of stressed cells and healthy changes to their behavior. But quercetin is poorly absorbed by the human body. Quercefit® is a unique and patented Phytosome® formulation of quercetin created to overcome this bioavailability obstacle. By creating a quercetin phytosome complex using sunflower lecithin, the bioavailability is dramatically enhanced.
Learn More About The Other 46 Ingredients
+
Trans-Resveratrol (trans-3, 5, 4'-trihydroxystilbene) in Qualia NAD+ is usually just called resveratrol. It is a stilbenoid, a type of natural polyphenol found in plants. Resveratrol has been the subject of thousands of pre-clinical and clinical research studies. It is best known for supporting healthy aging functions, and for supporting metabolism, heart health, immune health, and cognition.\ Resveratrol is a defense compound that plants make more of when exposed to environmental stressors. It toughens them up, making them more resistant to stress.
Magnesium (from Aquamin® MG)in Qualia NAD+. Magnesium is one of the most abundant minerals in the body and plays a vital role in supporting the function of all living cells. It’s used in more than 300 enzymes. ATP (i.e., cellular energy) occurs complexed with magnesium, so all enzymes utilizing ATP require magnesium to support their activity. ATP production, particularly through mitochondrial processes, promotes greater NAD+ turnover (the continuous use and recycling of NAD+).\
Coffeeberry® in Qualia NAD+ is made from organic coffee fruits, which are often called coffee cherries. Like cherries, coffee plants produce soft red fruits surrounding a pit or hard seed. The seed (or coffee "bean") is roasted to make coffee. But it’s the fruit that is being used to make Coffeeberry®. Similar to many fruits, coffee cherries are high in polyphenols. And like coffee beans, they also contain caffeine. Caffeine has been found to activate AMPK, a key energy-sensing enzyme that plays a significant role in promoting NAD+ biosynthesis.\
B-Complex Vitamins (from Saccharomyces cerevisiae culture) in Qualia NAD+ is an inactivated yeast that provides all eight B vitamins (and thus 8 ingredients within the Qualia NAD+ formula): thiamine (B1), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), biotin (B7), folic acid (B9), and cobalamin (B12). B vitamins have essential roles in cellular metabolism and energy production. Every B vitamin is either a cofactor or a precursor of a cofactor for a key metabolic process. B vitamins are essential for the generation of cell energy as ATP in mitochondria.\
LUTEOLIN found in Qualia Senolytic, is a yellow plant pigment used for centuries as a yellow dye. In fact, the latin name for yellow is luteus. Luteolin has a very similar molecular structure to quercetin, and much like fisetin, luteolin has also shown evidence of senolytic properties by helping the body manage senescent cell elimination.\
LONGVIDA OPTIMIZED CURCUMIN® EXTRACTis found in Qualia Senolytic. Curcumin is the pigment in turmeric that results in its yellow-orange coloring. Curcumin appears to provide senolytic support in intervertebral disc cells, but much like quercetin, it has poor bioavailability. Longvida Optimized Curcumin® Extract was developed to overcome this bioavailability hurdle and has been researched in human studies in areas including cognitive function, mood, exercise recovery, and joint health.\
PIPERLONGUMINE (FROM PIPER LONGUM ROOT EXTRACT) is an alkaloid found in many species of pepper plant, and found in abundance in the Asian long pepper plant (Piper longum), particularly in its root structure from which we source our piperlongumine. It is the only natural compound known to support a novel mechanism that helps manage senescent cells called oxidation resistance 1 or OXR1.\ You can find it in Qualia Senolytic.
OLIVE LEAF EXTRACT Oleuropein (a secoiridoid polyphenol) is found in high amounts within olive leaves. Our particular olive leaf extract is standardized for 40% oleuropein. A 2020 study showed that oleuropein supports the management of senescent chondrocytes—chondrocytes are the cells that create cartilage and support healthy joints (an area of our bodies which commonly experience noticeable negative aging symptoms).\ Olive leaf extract is a key ingredient in Qualia Senolytic.
MILK THISTLE FRUIT EXTRACT (found in Qualia Senolytic). The seed-like fruits from milk thistle (Silybum marianum) have been in Mediterranean diets for over 2,000 years. The main active substance in milk thistle is silymarin. Our extract is standardized to 80% silymarin by spectrophotometry, and has potential in playing a complementary role to other ingredients in Qualia Senolytic, particularly the stressed cell support of curcumin.\
SOYBEAN SEED EXTRACT Soybean seeds, like most legumes, contain a type of bioflavonoid called isoflavonoids. Our soybean seed extract is standardized at 40% isoflavones which shows promise as having a complementary role in our overall formulation. Daidzein, for example (an isoflavonoid in our extract) is one of the top four compounds identified as a possible candidate for helping manage some types of senescent cells.\ You can find it in Qualia Senolytic.
Improving the Experience of LifeTM
YOUR HAPPINESS IS GUARANTEED.
If you do not love Qualia for any reason, simply get in touch via phone or email and let us know you’d like a refund. More on our 100-day guarantee here.
FAQs
How do I get started with Qualia NAD+?
+
You can get started with Qualia NAD+ simply by taking 2 capsules with water or a beverage of your choice in the morning, with or without food. We recommend taking Qualia NAD+ at the beginning of your day because circadian (i.e., body clock) research in animals suggests that NAD+ boosting compounds offer better support for metabolic health when taken in the morning. Taking Qualia NAD+ at the start of your day makes the best use of these natural rhythms.\
How do I get started with Qualia Senolytic?
+
You should take Qualia Senolytic with whatever meal is most convenient for you, regardless of the time of day. You should take each serving on back-to-back days, i.e., six capsules per day on two consecutive days. Wait about four weeks before repeating. Use monthly for best results.\
What is the difference between Qualia Senolytic and Qualia NAD+?
+
While Qualia Senolytic and Qualia NAD+ both are longevity supplements, they have different objectives. Qualia Senolytic is designed to help the body naturally clear senescent cells. Qualia NAD+ has been clinically proven to boost NAD+ levels by 67%. Qualia NAD+ was designed to complement Qualia Senolytic.\
Should senolytics be taken every day?
+
We do not recommend taking Qualia Senolytic every day. Intermittent use—some experts call this a “hit and run” approach—is the way senolytics are most commonly used in clinical studies to support healthy aging. It is also the way we have supplemented Qualia Senolytic in our 3 studies.\‡  
‡Based on double-blind placebo-controlled studies. Individual results may vary. Full study results at qualialife.com/nad-clinical2 and .

What Qualia Stem Cell Supports
Qualia Stem Cell is the culmination of thousands of hours of research to strategize the best possible formula for promoting healthy stem cell activity throughout the body, to reawaken youthful vitality.

1 Pioneering Formula.
When we’re young, we can heal, recover, renew, and regenerate with remarkable ease, thanks in large part to the quantity and optimal functionality of our stem cells. But as we age, our stem cells plummet in number (and their ability to function well). Our science team delved deep into decades of stem cell research to identify evidence-based ingredients to help reawaken stem cell activity.\
The Science (And Art) Of Flourishing Stem Cells
Supporting stem cell activity through supplementation has always been a challenge. While a few other stem cell products exist, our science team could find none that addressed all six primary aspects of flourishing stem cell activity: 1- stem cell survival, 2- stem cell self-renewal, 3- stem cell mobilization, 4- stem cell migration, 5- stem cell proliferation, and 6- stem cell differentiation. Accomplishing this goal required a blend of 15 premium ingredients (often overlooked in other formulas) with ideal complementary dosages. The result is Qualia Stem Cell, a category-defining breakthrough in total stem cell support you only need to take just 4 days a month. Additionally, our formulation standards value principles such as:
Ancient Wisdom
Such as the inclusion of Okinawa Mozuku Extract, a seaweed common to the diet of Okinawans from coastal Japan, known as a "blue zone" for its exceptionally long-lived residents.
Impeccable Ingredient Sourcing
All ingredients in Qualia Stem Cell are gluten-free, 3rd party tested, and are manufactured and tested in the USA from globally sourced ingredients, with a strong emphasis on standardized, clinically studied ingredients.
Relationships Between Ingredients
We pioneered complex systems science in supplement formulations, which values the total effect of different ingredients in combination with each other, including deep study of their ideal dosage relationships, to achieve the greatest health benefits.\
Qualia Stem Cell Ingredients
CyanthOx™ (sea buckthorn fruit extract)
CyanthOx™ is an extract from sea buckhorn fruit (native to Tibet) which has been clinically studied for supporting the mobilization of stem cell types involved in the body’s healthy self-healing and self-renewal functions, including progenitor stem cells, endothelial stem cells, and lymphocytoid mesenchymal stem cells.\
Alomac® (Aloe macroclada extract)
Aloe macroclada is native to Madagascar,where it has been used by the Malagasy people for centuries to support natural healing and to promote rejuvenation and longevity. Alomac®, a standardized extract, has been studied for supporting healthy stem cell functions in humans, where it enhanced hematopoietic stem cells up 53%.\
Okinawa Mozuku Extract
Mozukuis a brown seaweed grown in the coastal waters of Okinawa, where it is a foundational superfood in this blue zone’s diet. This extract contains ≥85% fucoidan, which provides support for a healthy immune system and for stem cell functions including stem cell mobilization and migration.\
AFAninPlus® (Aphanizomenon flos-aquae extract)
AFAninPlus® is an extract derived from Aphanizomenon flos-aquae (AFA), a blue-green algae harvested from the pristine, high-desert Klamath Lake in Southern Oregon. Clinically, AFA has been shown to boost levels of circulating hematopoietic stem cells by an average of 25%, to support a healthy immune system, and provide free radical protection, which are essential for the healthy activities and survival mechanisms of stem cells.\
Astragalus root extract
Astragalus membranaceus, or Huang Qi, is a perennial herb native to northeast Asia, flourishing in dry, sandy soils and regions such as mountain thickets and vast grasslands. In Traditional Chinese Medicine it is one of the most important herbs for tonifying Qi and enhancing vitality, and is also renowned for healing and promoting healthy blood circulation. Preclinical studies suggest that Astragalus root aids healing by promoting healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\
Salvia miltiorrhiza extract
Salvia miltiorrhiza, known as Danshen in Traditional Chinese Medicine, primarily grows in the rich, earthy soils of East Asia’s temperate and subtropical regions along hillsides, moist stream banks, and in cool, shaded forests. Traditionally, Danshen was believed to have an affinity for the heart and was used to promote heart health, blood circulation, and healing. Preclinically, Danshen has been shown to support the healthy differentiation and proliferation of various stem cell types, leading to improved tissue health like heart and liver.\
White peony root extract
White peony is a Traditional Chinese Medicine native to central and eastern Asia that grows in a variety of environments, such as glasslands, woodland edges, dry meadows and sunny slopes. Paeoniflorin, a primary bioactive compound extracted from the roots of white peony, is known to maintain a balanced activity of CDC42, which is a crucial mechanism for stem cell rejuvenation. Preclinical studies show that paeoniflorin supports healthy stem cell proliferation, differentiation, and self-renewal, driving tissue regeneration.\
Learn More About The Other Ingredients
+
Sodium copper chlorophyllin Sodium copper chlorophyllin is derived from chlorophyll, the vibrant green pigment found in plants and algae that plays a crucial role in photosynthesis. In preclinical studies, this compound helps protect stem cells against oxidative stress and supports healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\
L-Serine L-Serine is an amino acid essential for protein synthesis and plays a vital role in stem cell function and maintenance. It is also required for nucleotide synthesis - the basic building blocks of DNA and RNA - which supports stem cell division, proliferation, and growth.\
NucleoPrime® Nucleotides Blend Nucleotides are the complex molecules that form DNA and RNA. DNA is sometimes referred to as the "blueprint for life", and RNA translates the information stored in DNA to make the proteins and express our genes. They are essential compounds during times of tissue self-renewal so act a bit like fuel for numerous stem cell functions.\
Wellmune® soluble yeast beta glucan Wellmune® Soluble supports the body’s natural defenses. Over a dozen clinical trials demonstrate the ability of Wellmune® to help maintain a healthy immune system and support overall energy and vitality. The soluble beta-glucans in Wellmune support healthy stem cell migration, renewal, and survival mechanisms.\
Bromelain Bromelain is a mixture of protein digesting enzymes derived primarily from the stem and fruit of the pineapple known for its use in promoting a healthy inflammatory response, in supporting tissue healing, and in supporting the production of extracellular matrix components, such as collagen. Preclinical studies demonstrate their ability to support creation of a favorable microenvironment for stem cell activities and tissue regeneration.\
Panax notoginsing root extract Panax notoginseng, or Sanqi/Tianqi in Traditional Chinese Medicine, is a prized medicinal plant native to the warm mountainous regions of Southwest China, and is known for promoting healthy blood circulation, supporting healing, and supporting the immune system. In preclinical studies, Panax notoginseng root has been shown to support the healthy differentiation and proliferation of various stem cell types, leading to improved tissue renewal.\
Ferulic acid Ferulic acid, the primary bioactive compound in Angelica sinensis (Danggui in Traditional Chinese Medicine), is mainly responsible for its antioxidant properties and ability to support healing through the formation of healthy new blood vessels. Besides the preclinical evidence that it supports healthy stem cell differentiation, it is also known to support stem cell self-renewal, or maintenance of the stem cell pool over time.\
Royal jelly powder Royal jelly is the nutrient-rich secretion produced by worker honeybees exclusively for the queen bee and young, known especially for supporting the queen’s longevity, fertility, and vitality. It contains a complex of bioactive compounds, including the unique fatty acid 10-hydroxy-2-decenoic acid (10-HDA), which preclinical studies have shown promotes stem cell proliferation and differentiation, promotes telomere health and supports cellular health.\

FAQs
How should I take Qualia Stem Cell?
+
Take 6 capsules with water each morning for 4 consecutive days. Repeat monthly for best results. You can take three capsules of Qualia Stem Cell twice a day at different meals, or take all six capsules at once.
Why do you recommend taking Qualia Stem Cell for only 4 days a month?
+
Stem cells are often in a resting state—inactive but ready to act when needed. Qualia Stem Cell was formulated to help “wake” some of them to support healing and healthy aging. Instead of activating stem cells daily, we think it makes more sense to support activity for short bursts of time, mimicking a healthy physiological healing response.\
How soon will I notice a difference?
+
The core botanicals promoting optimal circulating stem cell levels are branded ingredients (CyanthOx™, AFAninPlus®, Aloemac®) with clinical studies suggesting that an increase in stem cell numbers occurs within 3 hours after consuming the product. The timeline for seeing benefits after this initial increase in numbers can vary significantly depending on individual factors, but it could take up to several months to begin to notice benefits. Qualia Stem Cell is a product that should be thought of as something that provides more benefit with repeated cycles of use.\
Do I need to take it every month or could I take it quarterly instead?
+
Taking Qualia Stem Cell less than once a month is fine, but the trade-off is receiving less stem cell support for tissue healing and healthy aging. Monthly is the dosing approach we recommend for adults of all ages who are beginning to notice or experience signs of aging. For younger individuals under 30 or those not yet experiencing aging effects, quarterly use can be a proactive option.\

The Science (And Art) Of Healthy Energy
There’s countless unhealthy energy drinks, with megadoses of sugar, caffeine, and dangerous stimulants. But how much _healthy_ energy could we pack into a great tasting shot? That is the question we asked ourselves when formulating Qualia Energy Shot. This meant starting with core Qualia principles: keep it vegan, non-GMO and gluten-free. For a sweetener, we used PalatinoseTMfrom sugar beets, known for its low glycaemic profile. We kept the caffeine at 80 mg (less than an average cup of coffee). Finally, our formula nourishes the brain with vitamins, minerals, and powerful nootropic compounds backed by strong scientific research, working together to unleash effortless focus, optimal mood, and the energy to get things done. Taurine
Taurine is an amino acid found in many foods (ours is vegan sourced) and can also be produced in the human body. Taurine is present in nearly all bodily tissues, and is the most abundant free amino acid in muscle, heart, brain, and retina. Taurine supports neuroprotective functions and helps regulate neurotransmitter activity.

Palatinose TM also known as isomaltulose, is a sweetener derived from sugar beets. It provides a slow, sustained release of energy by being digested more gradually than regular sugars, allowing for a low glycaemic profile.

When should I take a Qualia Energy Shot™?
+
The simple answer is “whenever you want to feel energy support.” Some situations include:
   First thing in the morning to help you start the day alert, focused, and energized.
   Before a workout to give you the energy support and motivation you need to start fast and finish strong.

Why is there only 80 mg of caffeine?
+
The pioneers of modern energy drinks appeared in the 1960s and early 1970s in countries like Japan, Korea, and Thailand. These original energy beverages, the true OGs, contained significantly less caffeine than the high-powered energy drinks and shots we see today.
Qualia Energy Shot™ pays homage to the wisdom of those early formulations, delivering a Goldilock amount—a “just right” amount of caffeine to boost energy and alertness without the jitters or crashes associated with overconsumption. Sometimes, less really is more, and too much caffeine can be counterproductive. Designed with balance in mind, Qualia Energy Shot™ is your “just right” solution for sustained energy.
Why does Qualia Energy Shot™ use the cyanocobalamin form of vitamin B12?
+
The most stable form of vitamin B12 for products like energy shots is cyanocobalamin. While we prefer using the coenzyme forms of B12—methylcobalamin and adenosylcobalamin—these forms are unstable in light, especially in liquid formulations.
Cyanocobalamin is a safe, well-studied form of vitamin B12 and has been widely used in scientific research. Occasionally, it’s criticized for containing cyanide. While it’s true that cyanocobalamin includes trace amounts of cyanide, the quantity is minuscule—far less than what’s found in a single almond. This highlights an essential principle of toxicology: “the dose makes the poison.” In other words, the amount matters. For more details, check out the article “Oh My, There is Cyanide in B12 Supplements. Really.”
